Hero.subtitle: Find the best rates to send money to Nigeria, Philippines & 30+ countries. Compare Wise, Remitly, Western Union & more.

Corridors.title: Popular Corridors for Diaspora
Corridors.subtitle: Real-time mid-market rates for the most popular remittance corridors from the US.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to find the best remittance deal.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Enter the amount and corridor. We fetch live rates, fees, and speeds from 8+ providers instantly.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: See a transparent side-by-side comparison. Sort by total received, fee, or delivery speed.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Click through to your chosen provider and complete the transfer. Save up to 8x on fees.

Providers.title: Trusted Providers We Compare
Providers.subtitle: We compare rates and fees from the world's leading money transfer services so you don't have to.

Trust.title: Trust & Security
Trust.subtitle: We are a comparison platform. We never handle your money or personal data.
Trust.bankSecurityDesc: 256-bit SSL encryption protects all your data.
Trust.dataProtectedDesc: We never store or share your personal information.
Trust.realTimeRatesDesc: Rates are fetched live from every provider for accuracy.
Trust.trustedByUsersDesc: Thousands of diaspora members rely on us every month.

Premium.title: Save More with

Premium.unlimitedAlertsDesc: Get notified the moment your corridor hits your target rate — via SMS or email.

Premium.predictionsDesc: Our model analyzes patterns and tells you if you should send now or wait.
Premium.apiWhiteLabelDesc: Power your app or bank with live rates. Embed our widget under your brand.

Footer.description: Compare remittance rates from top providers. Find the best exchange rates, lowest fees, and fastest transfers for sending money abroad.
Footer.disclosure: 1StopRemittance earns commissions from partner links. This does not affect our rankings or recommendations.

Compare.title: Compare Live Rates
Compare.subtitle: Real-time comparison across 8+ major providers. Updated every 60 seconds.
Compare.savingsSuffix: by comparing providers and picking the right one!
Compare.disclaimer: Rates shown are indicative and updated live — they may vary slightly at checkout. 1StopRemittance earns affiliate commissions when you click through and complete a transfer. This never influences the order of results — providers are ranked by amount received.
